metadata.title: easy-toggle-sidebars
metadata.description: toggle sidebars double-clicking middle mouse button or each sidebar clicking middle mouse button and moving mouse towards the corresponding sidebar.

regex.target:
Notice(
            settings.autoHide ? "自动隐藏已启用" : "自动隐藏已禁用",
            2e3
          )

regex.source: .setName("double click on tab headers to toggle pin")
regex.target: .setName("双击标签页标题以切换固定状态")

regex.source: .setDesc("could be used in ribbon bar, when using canvas")
regex.target: .setDesc("在使用画布时，可用于功能区栏")
.setDesc("触发自动缩小/关闭侧边栏的最小宽度")

regex.source: .setDesc("max delay to trigger a double click")
double click to toggle both sidebars
click and move toward the sideBar you want to toggle
regex.target: 点击并移动鼠标至想要切换的边栏方向

regex.source: you can do previous operations from the ribbon bar using double clic and vertical moves (up/down). this is useful when in canvas
regex.target: 可以在功能区栏中通过双击和垂直移动（上下）执行上述操作，这在使用画布时很有用

regex.source: autoHide to automatically hide sidebars when clicking on the editor
regex.target: 自动隐藏功能，可在点击编辑器时自动隐藏侧边栏
功能区栏中添加了自动隐藏切换按钮

regex.source: hide sidebars under a minimal editor WIDTH
regex.target: 当编辑器宽度小于设定值时隐藏侧边栏
新增“切换两侧边栏”命令。
